title: The Bishop Pair
summary: Two bishops are worth more than you think

steps.title: Why Two Bishops?
steps.text: Two bishops cover ALL 64 squares between them — one dark, one light. A bishop pair is worth ~0.5 pawns more than a bishop+knight or two knights. This advantage compounds in open positions.

steps.title: When to Trade
steps.text: If you have the bishop pair: open the position, trade PAWNS not pieces, avoid allowing a knight outpost. If you GAVE up the bishop pair: close the position, create pawn chains, fight for knight outposts.
